caption_baseline:
The image depicts an open concept living room with hardwood floors that leads to a dining area. In this space, there is a woman standing near the kitchen counter, possibly preparing food or engaging in conversation. Another person can be seen sitting at one end of the dining table, which has chairs placed around it. There are two potted plants in the room, adding some greenery to the environment.

The living room features a TV mounted on the wall, while the dining area includes a refrigerator situated close by. Additionally, there's a clock hanging above the dining table, allowing people to keep track of time during meals or gatherings.

The image features an adult brown bear sitting on top of grass with its head turned to the side. It appears to be looking at something off-camera or possibly observing another animal nearby. The bear is positioned towards the left side of the frame, occupying most of it from the center to almost the edge.

The surrounding environment consists mainly of green grass, which covers the ground where the bear sits. There are no other animals or people visible in this particular shot.

The image depicts a cozy bedroom with a large blue quilted bed situated underneath a window that allows natural light to flood into the room. There are several books scattered throughout the space, indicating an interest in reading or studying. Some books can be found on shelves near the window, while others are placed around the room. In addition to the books, there is a potted plant located close to the window, adding a touch of greenery to the environment. Furthermore, a vase is present within the room, possibly holding flowers or other decorative items.

The image features an intersection with a red stop sign prominently displayed on top of a metal pole. There are several vehicles present at this location, including two trucks parked near each other, one closer to the left side of the frame and another further back towards the center. Additionally, there is a car positioned slightly behind the first truck on the left side. Another car can be seen farther away from the main group, located more toward the right edge of the image.

The image features an assortment of teddy bears gathered together on top of a bed or couch. There are at least five different teddy bears present in various positions within the scene. Some of them appear to be sitting close to each other while others are spread out across the surface. One teddy bear is situated towards the left side of the frame, another one can be found near the center, and two more are positioned closer to the right edge of the image. Overall, it's a cozy and inviting scene with these stuffed animals arranged comfortably.

The image features a woman wearing skis on a snow-covered slope. She is skiing downhill with her arms outstretched to maintain balance as she glides through the snow. Her skis are clearly visible beneath her feet, providing support and stability during this activity. In addition to the main female skier, there are two other people present in the background, possibly enjoying their time at the ski resort or observing others' skiing skills.

The image depicts a small kitchen with white appliances and wooden cabinets. There is an oven located on one side of the room, while another oven can be seen further back. Two refrigerators are present; one occupies most of the space from left to right, while the other is situated closer to the center-left area of the kitchen. Additionally, there's a sink positioned near the middle of the room.

The kitchen appears to be well-organized, featuring several knives placed neatly around the countertops. Some bottles are also scattered throughout the space, adding to its lived-in atmosphere. Overall, this compact yet functional kitchen offers ample storage and workspace for daily tasks.

The image captures an exciting moment during a baseball game on a field with green grass. Two men are playing against each other, one wearing a white shirt while the other is dressed in gray. They appear to be running towards home plate as they both attempt to catch the ball being thrown by another player. In total, there are four people present in the scene, including those who may not be directly involved in the play but could potentially be teammates or opponents waiting their turn at bat.

The sports ball can be seen flying through the air near the center-right part of the image. There's also a baseball glove located close to the right side of the frame, possibly belonging to one of the players trying to catch the ball.

The image captures an exciting moment on a tennis court where two men are playing against each other during a match. One man is actively swinging his racket at a ball while another player watches from behind him. There are several chairs placed around the court, likely for players to rest between games or sets. In addition to the players, there's also a clock mounted on one side of the wall, allowing spectators to keep track of time during matches.

The image features a group of young people gathered on a tennis court, posing together with their coaches. There are at least thirteen individuals present, some standing closer to each other while others maintain more distance from one another. They appear to be enjoying themselves as they pose for this special moment.

The tennis court is equipped with two sports balls placed near the center of the court, along with three tennis rackets scattered around the area. One racket can be seen close to the left side of the court, another towards the right side, and the third one located further back. Additionally, there's an umbrella situated off-court, possibly providing shade or protection during breaks between matches.

The image features a man sitting on a bench near a body of water, possibly a river or lake. He is wearing a red shirt and appears to be enjoying his time by the waterfront. Another person can be seen standing nearby, taking pictures with their camera. There are two birds present in the scene; one bird is perched close to the man seated on the bench while another bird is flying above them.

In addition to the people and wildlife, there are several boats scattered throughout the area. Some boats are closer to the shore, while others are further away from it. This suggests that this location might be popular among boaters who come here to relax and enjoy the view.

The image features a woman wearing glasses who is holding up her cell phone to take a picture or view something on it. She appears focused on capturing the moment or checking an important piece of information. There are several other people present in the background, but they do not seem to be interacting with the woman taking the photo.

In addition to the cell phone held by the woman, there are two more cell phones visible in the scene – one located near the top right corner and another towards the bottom left side. These devices might belong to some of the individuals in the background.

The image depicts a group of children enjoying themselves on an amusement park ride. They are sitting together inside a small red train car that is part of a larger roller coaster-like structure. There are at least nine kids visible in the scene, with some seated closer to the front of the train while others occupy more distant seats.

The children appear to be having fun as they sit close to each other, possibly engaging in conversations or sharing their excitement about the ride. The overall atmosphere seems lively and joyful, capturing the essence of childhood memories and shared experiences within this entertaining environment.

The image features a dining table with an open-faced sandwich sitting on top of it. This delicious treat is made up of two slices of bread, one placed above the other, filled with various ingredients such as meat, jelly, and sauce. The sandwich appears to be half eaten, indicating that someone has already started enjoying their meal.

In addition to the sandwich, there are several bowls scattered around the table. One large bowl can be seen towards the right side of the table, while another smaller bowl is located closer to the center. There's also a cup situated near the left edge of the table. Furthermore, a person is partially visible at the upper part of the image, likely preparing or serving food during this mealtime gathering.

The image features a person paddling on top of a surfboard in calm waters near the shore. They are wearing a black wetsuit while standing upright on their board, skillfully navigating through the water. In addition to this individual, there is another person further back in the scene, possibly observing or waiting for their turn to join the activity.

The surrounding area consists of several houses situated along the shoreline, creating a picturesque coastal landscape. There's also an umbrella placed close to one of these homes, providing some shade from the sun. Overall, it appears to be a pleasant day at the beach with people enjoying various activities by the ocean.

The image features a desk with two laptops placed on it. One laptop is positioned towards the left side of the table while the other occupies more space to its right. There are also three keyboards on the desk – one near each laptop and another closer to the center-right area. Additionally, there's a mouse located at the bottom-left corner of the desk.

The room appears to be an office or workspace, as evidenced by the presence of multiple computers and peripherals. Two TV screens can be seen mounted on the wall above the desks, providing additional display options for the users.

The image depicts a busy highway with multiple cars driving underneath an overpass. There are at least nine vehicles on the road, including one truck located near the center-left side of the frame. Some cars can be seen further back, while others are closer to the front of the scene.

The highway is surrounded by trees that provide a natural background to the urban environment. Two traffic lights are present in the scene; one is situated towards the left side of the image, and another is found more centrally. Additionally, there's a person standing close to the right edge of the picture, possibly observing the traffic or waiting to cross the street.

The image features a red double-decker bus driving down a city street with several people around it. There are at least nine individuals scattered throughout the scene, some closer to the bus while others stand further away from it. One person is carrying a handbag as they walk alongside the busy road.

The street appears to be bustling with activity, as there are two other vehicles present - one car located near the right edge of the frame and another smaller vehicle on the left side. Additionally, there's a traffic light situated towards the top left corner of the image, indicating that this area might have controlled intersections or pedestrian crossings.

The image features a black cat lying on top of an open laptop computer. It appears that the cat is either sleeping or resting comfortably on the keyboard area of the laptop. The laptop occupies most of the lower half of the frame, with its screen facing towards the left side of the image.

The image features an airplane flying high above a large bridge that spans across the entire width of the frame. The plane is positioned towards the top left corner of the picture, while the bridge stretches from the middle to almost the right edge of the image. There are two people visible on the ground near the bottom-left side of the photo, possibly enjoying the view or attending to their surroundings. Additionally, there's another person standing further back on the right side of the image.

The image features two zebras standing close to each other on a grassy field. One zebra is positioned towards the left side of the frame while the other occupies most of the right side. They appear to be interacting with one another or possibly nuzzling their heads together. In addition to these two prominent zebras, there are several smaller figures scattered throughout the background, likely representing more members of their herd.

The image features a cozy bedroom with a large window that allows natural light to fill the space. In front of this window is a neatly made bed adorned by a colorful comforter. There are two chairs placed within the room; one chair is located near the left side of the bed while another chair can be found closer to the right edge of the frame. Additionally, there's a dining table situated towards the bottom-left corner of the room.

A few other items are present in the room as well. An umbrella rests on the floor close to the center of the room, and a remote control lies nearby. Furthermore, a clock hangs on the wall above the bed, providing a sense of time during relaxation or sleep.

The image features a large purple bus driving down a street with several people around it. One man is sitting on top of the bus, possibly enjoying the view or waiting to board. Another person can be seen standing near the front of the bus, while two more individuals are located further back along the sidewalk. There's also another person closer to the center of the scene.

The bus occupies most of the frame, stretching from one end of the image to the other. It appears to be a public transit vehicle, providing transportation services within the city.

The image features an assortment of green apples arranged on top of a white plate or bowl. There are at least nine distinct apples displayed in various positions around the dish. Some apples can be seen closer to the front edge of the plate while others are positioned more towards the back. Overall, it is a visually appealing arrangement that showcases the vibrant color of these fresh fruits.

The image captures an exciting moment during a baseball game on a field with green grass. There are several players actively participating in the match. One player is holding a bat, ready to swing at the incoming pitch. Another player can be seen wearing a baseball glove, likely preparing to catch or throw the ball. In total, there are eight people present in various positions across the field.

The sports ball is located near the center-right part of the field, while the batter stands closer to the left side of the frame. Some other players are scattered around the field, some standing close together, possibly discussing strategies or waiting for their turn to play. Overall, it's a lively scene filled with action and anticipation as the players engage in this thrilling sport.

The image features an outdoor dining table set with various plates of food, including a delicious cake placed towards the left side of the table. There are multiple wine glasses scattered across the table, some closer to the center while others are positioned nearer to the edges. In addition to the wine glasses, there is also a cup situated on the right side of the table.

The table appears to be well-prepared for guests as it has several bowls containing different types of snacks or appetizers. Some of these bowls can be found at the top right corner of the table, while another one is located more centrally. Furthermore, two sandwiches are present on the table, one close to the middle and the other slightly further away from the center.

The image captures an exciting moment at the beach where a man is riding on top of a wave while lying down on his surfboard. He appears to be skillfully navigating through the water as he enjoys this thrilling activity. Another person can be seen further back in the scene, possibly watching or waiting for their turn to join the fun.

The ocean's waves are prominent throughout the image, with one large wave dominating the center-left area and another smaller wave located towards the right side. There are also two additional smaller waves present near the bottom left corner of the picture. Overall, it's a lively scene that showcases the excitement and adventure associated with surfing.

The black-and-white photograph captures an old school classroom with numerous children posing together for a group picture. There are at least thirteen kids in various positions within the frame, some standing while others sit on chairs that can be seen throughout the room. They appear to be enjoying their time as they gather around each other.

The classroom is furnished with multiple chairs placed near the walls or along the edges of the room. Some chairs are positioned closer to the front of the room, while others are situated further back. Additionally, there's a tie hanging from one of the chairs, adding a touch of personal style to the scene.

The image features a wooden dining table with an assortment of food items on it. There are several pieces of bread placed around the table, along with some toast that appears to be burnt or charred. In addition to the bread, there is a bowl containing soup, which adds variety to the meal.

The table also has utensils such as knives and spoons laid out neatly. Two wine glasses can be seen at opposite ends of the table, suggesting that this might be a dinner party or gathering where guests will enjoy both food and drinks.

The image captures an exciting moment on a snow-covered slope where a skier is performing a jump high up in the air with their skis crossed. There are several other people present in the background, likely watching or waiting to ski themselves. Some of them can be seen closer to the left side of the frame while others are scattered around the right side.

The primary focus remains on the person executing the impressive aerial maneuver. Their skis are clearly visible as they soar through the air, showcasing skill and control during this thrilling activity.

The image features a person standing on top of a snow-covered mountain with skis attached to their feet. They are wearing black pants and appear to be enjoying the winter landscape around them. In addition to the main individual, there is another person further back in the scene, possibly observing or waiting for their turn to ski down the slope.

The mountainous terrain stretches across the entire background of the photo, creating an impressive natural scenery. There are also two trees visible in the distance, adding more depth and dimension to the environment. Overall, it's a captivating winter scene that showcases outdoor recreational activities amidst breathtaking surroundings.

The image features two bananas placed next to each other on a table or countertop. One banana is located towards the left side while the other one is positioned more centrally. In addition to these fruits, there are three donuts present in the scene. Two of them can be seen closer together near the center-right area, with another smaller donut situated further back on the right side. This arrangement creates an interesting contrast between the natural fruit and the sweet treats.

The image features a dining table with various items on it. On one side of the table, there is an open black knife placed next to a white coffee mug that has a skull design on it. This pirate-themed cup sits atop the table, adding a touch of whimsy to the scene. Additionally, another smaller cup can be seen near the edge of the table.

The image depicts a lively social gathering with several people standing around a bar area. There are at least nine individuals present, engaged in conversation or enjoying their time together. Some guests can be seen holding wine glasses, while others have handbags placed nearby.

The room features a dining table situated towards the left side of the space, surrounded by chairs. Various bottles are scattered throughout the scene, indicating that this is likely an event where drinks are being served. Additionally, there's a clock on the wall near the center of the room, providing a sense of time during the festivities.

The image features an open field with tall grass where several birds are walking around. There is one bird closer to the left side of the frame, another nearer to the center, and two more towards the right side. In addition to these birds, there's also a seagull flying above the field, adding variety to the avian presence.

The field appears to be situated next to water, as evidenced by the boats docked nearby. There are four boats visible in the background, varying in size and positioning. Some boats can be seen further back on the left side, while others are located closer to the middle and right side of the scene. Overall, this serene landscape captures the beauty of nature and its inhabitants.

The image features a man wearing gloves who is kneeling down next to an open white toilet bowl. He appears to be working on or inspecting the toilet, possibly performing maintenance tasks. There are two sinks in the room; one is located near the left side of the frame while the other sink can be seen further back towards the right edge of the picture. Additionally, there's another person standing at the far end of the room, partially obscured by the first individual.

The image captures a group of people standing on top of a snow-covered mountain slope with their skis. There are at least six individuals present, some closer to each other while others stand further apart. They appear to be enjoying their time together as they take in the breathtaking view of the surrounding mountains.

The skiers have left tracks behind them, indicating that they have been traversing the slopes. Some of these tracks can be seen near the center of the image, while others extend towards the right side. In addition to the people and tracks, there is also a backpack placed on the ground close to one of the individuals, possibly containing essential items or belongings during their adventure.

The image features a white bowl placed on top of a wooden dining table. Inside the bowl, there is an appetizing meal consisting of rice, beans, broccoli, and carrots. The vegetables are distributed throughout the bowl with some pieces closer to the edge while others are more centrally located. The combination of these ingredients creates a visually appealing and nutritious dish that can be enjoyed by those who partake in it.

The image features a person riding on top of a skateboard down a wooden path or boardwalk. They are skillfully balancing themselves while performing this action. There is another smaller figure located towards the right side of the frame, but it appears to be unrelated to the primary focus of the scene.

The skateboarder's feet can be seen clearly positioned on the skateboard as they ride along the path. The surrounding environment consists mainly of grassy areas with some dirt patches, creating an outdoor recreational atmosphere.

The image features an arrangement of bananas on top of each other, creating a visually appealing stack. There are at least six bananas in various positions within this stack, with some overlapping others. They appear to be placed on a dining table or countertop, which serves as their base. In addition to the bananas, there is also a bottle located near the left side of the frame, possibly containing a drink or condiment that complements the fruit display.

The image features a dining table with a plate filled with various food items placed on it. On this plate, there is an entree consisting of chicken, broccoli, carrots, cauliflower, and rice. In addition to the main course, there are two cups present – one near the top left corner of the table and another at the bottom right side.

A fork can be seen resting next to the plate, while a spoon lies closer to the center-left area of the table. There's also a knife located towards the upper part of the table. Another smaller portion of food is situated further away from the main plate, close to the edge of the table.

The image depicts a lively gathering where several people are playing video games on a Nintendo Wii console. In total, there are nine individuals present in various positions around the room. One young girl is standing up and actively engaged with the game using a remote control. Another person can be seen holding a wine glass, possibly enjoying some drinks during the party.

The living area features two couches placed against the walls, one nearer to the left side of the room and another towards the right side. There's also a chair located closer to the center of the space. Various bottles are scattered throughout the room, indicating that guests have been consuming refreshments while they play. Additionally, a cup can be spotted close to the middle-right part of the room.

The image depicts two men shaking hands at an event or gathering. They are standing close to each other with their arms extended towards one another. Both men appear to be dressed formally, wearing ties that can be seen clearly on them.

The room they are in is filled with various dining tables scattered throughout the space. There are multiple chairs placed around these tables, suggesting that this could be a conference hall or a similar venue where people come together for meetings or events. Additionally, there are several cups and wine glasses placed on some of the tables, indicating that guests may have been enjoying refreshments during the occasion.

The image features a man wearing a yellow shirt with a brown tie standing next to a window. He appears to be looking downward or possibly staring at something outside the frame. His attire suggests that he might be dressed up for an event or formal occasion. In addition to his outfit, there is another person partially visible on the right side of the image.

The room has two chairs placed near each other, one closer to the left edge of the picture and the other towards the center-right area. There are also three ties in the scene; one tied around the neck of the man in the yellow shirt, another hanging from the chair's back, and the third one located further away from the main subjects.

The living room is furnished with two couches placed against opposite walls, creating an L-shaped layout. One couch is situated on the left side of the room, while the other occupies the right side. There are also three chairs in the space – one near each wall and another closer to the center. In addition to these seating options, there's a TV mounted on the wall above the first couch, providing entertainment for those sitting down.

The room has a yellow color scheme that adds warmth to the atmosphere. A remote control can be seen resting on top of one of the couches, indicating that someone might have been watching television recently or plans to do so later. Overall, this cozy living area offers ample seating and entertainment options for its inhabitants.

The image captures an exciting moment where a person is skillfully riding a wave on top of their surfboard. They are wearing a yellow shirt while maintaining balance as they glide through the water. Another individual can be seen further back in the scene, possibly observing or waiting to join the action.

The ocean waves surrounding them create a dynamic environment that showcases the thrill of surfing. There's also another surfboard located near the center-right part of the image, suggesting that this could be a popular spot for surfers to gather and enjoy the sport together.

The image features a black cat sitting on top of a wooden desk next to an open laptop computer. The cat appears curious as it looks at the screen with interest. There is also another keyboard located near the bottom left corner of the desk. In addition to these items, there are two cell phones placed close together towards the right side of the desk.

The image captures an outdoor event where several people are gathered around a red ribbon that is being cut by two men using large scissors. There are at least twelve individuals present in various positions within the scene, with some standing closer to the ribbon while others stand further away. Among them, there's a child wearing a helmet who appears to be participating in the celebration.

The atmosphere seems festive as everyone looks on attentively during this momentous occasion. In addition to the people and the scissors, there are three handbags scattered throughout the scene, possibly belonging to the attendees. One person can also be seen holding a cell phone, likely capturing memories from the event.

The image features a large white bus driving down a street with its doors open. It appears to be picking up passengers or dropping them off at their destination. There are several people around the bus; some are standing close to it while others can be seen further away from the vehicle. One person is carrying a handbag, which suggests they might have just arrived at their stop or are preparing to board the bus. Overall, the scene depicts an active transportation hub where people gather and move about.

The image features a man sitting on the floor in front of a large mirror. He is taking a picture of himself using his cell phone, capturing both his reflection and the surrounding area. In addition to the man, there are two other people present in the room, one standing near the left side of the frame and another person closer to the right edge.

The room has various items scattered around it. There's an umbrella placed towards the center-left part of the space, while a handbag can be seen resting nearby. Two bottles are also located within the room – one close to the top-right corner and the other at the bottom-right corner. Furthermore, a chair is situated against the wall, providing seating options for those who may want to relax or engage with others in the room.
